caption: Threat Intelligence Inventory Info
description: Threat Intelligence Inventory Info events report threat intelligence inventory data that is logged or proactively collected—for example from Threat Intelligence Platforms (TIPs), XDR, enrichment APIs, data stores, or open and commercial feeds.
name: threat_intel_inventory_info

actor.description: The actor describes the process that was the source of the inventory activity. For threat intelligence inventory, that could be a process or script that collects or syncs indicators—for example a job that pulls from a MISP or Shodan API.

threat_intel.description: The threat intelligence record being discovered by an inventory process.
